title: Platinum Federal Credit Union Collaborates with Jack Henry to Focus on Financial Health
text: Enhanced experience will offer a fully integrated view of finances, while also expanding features and functionalities for Shia Ismaili Muslim community members MONETT, Mo. , May 31, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry™ (Nasdaq: JKHY), today announced that Platinum Federal Credit Union (PFCU) is working with Jack Henry to improve their community's financial health by growing their membership and focusing on the financial health of their members.

title: Jack Henry & Associates: Positioned For Accretive, Integrated Growth
text: Over the past year, Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. has trailed both the S&P 500 Index and TradingView's financial technology index. This comes in spite of 2021-22 free cash flow growth of 7.02% in addition to scale growth supporting a 10.50% increase in total revenues to $1.94bn.

title: Jack Henry Releases Benchmark of Bank and Credit Union CEOs' Top Priorities
text: Research identifies financial institutions' strategic priorities for 2023 and 2024 MONETT, Mo. , May 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Deposits, loans, data, and efficiency top the list of strategic priorities for community and regional financial institutions, according to Jack Henry's fifth-annual survey of bank and credit union CEOs.

title: Jack Henry Continues Phase Out of Screen Scraping on the Banno Digital Banking Platform
text: Company has replaced inbound screen scraping with safe and secure consumer-permissioned data sharing through open-banking APIs across hundreds of thousands of apps and millions of accountholders MONETT, Mo. , May 23, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry™ (Nasdaq: JKHY) announced it continues to replace inbound screen scraping on its Banno Digital Banking Platform with API connections to all five major data exchange platforms, Finicity, Akoya, Plaid, Envestnet | Yodlee , and Intuit, giving accountholders more control of their financial data and protecting financial institutions from a wide range of fraud and security risks that arise from passwords shared with third parties.

title: Jack Henry's (JKHY) Client Base to Get a Boost With FedNow
text: Jack Henry's (JKHY) is likely to expand its reach among financial institutions through FedNow Service, a real-time payments network.

title: Jack Henry Expands Real-Time Payments Presence with the New FedNow Service
text: Proprietary payments hub provides ready-built connection to the latest real-time payments network   MONETT, Mo. , May 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry™ (Nasdaq: JKHY) announced today that it is operationally ready to support the launch of the Federal Reserve's real-time payments network, the FedNowSM Service.

title: Jack Henry Executives to Offer Insights at Upcoming Events
text: MONETT, Mo. , May 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. ®  (Nasdaq: JKHY) announced today that it will be participating in the upcoming conferences: Mimi Carsley, CFO & Treasurer, will present at the MoffettNathanson Inaugural Technology, Media, and Telecom Conference on May 18 th.

title: Jack Henry (JKHY) Q3 Earnings Top Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: Jack Henry's (JKHY) third-quarter fiscal 2023 results benefit from strength across the Core, Complementary, Payments and Corporate segments.

title: Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. Reports Third Quarter Fiscal 2023 Results
text: Fiscal year-to-date summary: GAAP revenue increased 6% and GAAP operating income decreased 4% for the nine months ended March 31, 2023, compared to the prior-year period. Non-GAAP adjusted revenue increased 8% and non-GAAP adjusted operating income increased 5% for the nine months ended March 31, 2023, compared to the prior-year period.1 GAAP EPS was $3.68 per diluted share for the nine months ended March 31, 2023, compared to $3.84 in the prior-year period.

title: What's in the Offing for Jack Henry (JKHY) in Q3 Earnings?
text: Jack Henry's (JKHY) fiscal third-quarter results are expected to reflect strength across the Core, Payments and Complementary segments amid mounting expenses.
